name: apply_patch
description:
Apply a file text edit using V4A context-anchored diff format.

# Format

The "diff" argument must follow this structure exactly:

## Update an existing file:

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: {path}
@@ {anchor_line}
{prefixed_lines}
*** End Patch

## Create a new file from scratch:

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: {path}
+{line1}
+{line2}
*** End Patch

When creating a file, set mode to "create". Every line must start with "+".

Every line between @@ and the next @@ or *** End Patch MUST start with one of these three prefix characters:
  " " (space) = context line — an exact unchanged copy of the line from the file
  "-"         = a line being removed — must exactly match the file
  "+"         = a line being added

The @@ anchor is a line from the file that helps locate where to apply the edit. A bare @@ alone means "start of file."

# Rules

1. Every single line in a hunk must begin with a space, -, or +. No exceptions.
2. Context lines and - lines must be character-for-character copies from the file.
3. Only one apply_patch call. Put all hunks in a single diff string.
4. Keep changes minimal.

# Examples

Update a file:

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /src/math.ts
@@
 function add(a: number, b: number) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }
*** End Patch

Create a new file (mode: "create"):

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /src/config.ts
+export const PORT = 8080
+export const HOST = "localhost"
*** End Patch

Two fixes in one file:

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /src/math.ts
@@ function add(
 function add(a: number, b: number) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }
@@ function sub(
 function sub(a: number, b: number) {
-  return a + b
+  return a - b
 }
*** End Patch

Adding a new line:

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /src/math.ts
@@ function divide(
 function divide(a: number, b: number) {
+  if (b === 0) throw new Error("division by zero")
   return a / b
 }
*** End Patch

path.description: The absolute path to the file to modify

diff.description: V4A diff with @@ anchor headers and space/+/- prefixed lines

mode.description: default = update existing file, create = write new file from scratch (all lines must start with +)
